title: BetterJoinLeave
description: Replaces "joined the game" messages with [+] and [-] icons.
body:
BetterJoinLeave — beautiful entrances and exits of players

This mod replaces the standard Minecraft messages
"Player joined the game" and "Player left the game"
with stylish minimalistic [+] and [-] symbols in the chat.

✨ Capabilities

Replaces the login and exit system messages.

Supports Fabric 1.21.4 and higher.

It only works on the client — it does not require installation on the server.

Perfect for a clean, tidy interface.

Compatible with other chat mods.

Please note: The mod operates in English; there is currently no support for other languages.
